purpose: Record the sparse neighbor-carrier law boundary after pruning the saturated complete carrier.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This records a sparse 120-record neighbor-carrier law.
The sparse law is not a source-native WXYZTI generator.
No independent witness layer is proven.

summary.terminal_reason: A sparse neighbor-carrier law was found, correcting the complete-graph saturation caveat, but it remains a 120-record source-shell/register carrier rather than full G900.

boundary_record.short_form: Sparse neighbor carrier supported; full G900 not reached.
keeper_lines: Neighbor accounting does not require saturated accounting.
The complete 120-record carrier can be pruned.
A sparse source-facing law, shared_B plus reverse_partner, reaches the full 120-record background.
The sparse law still settles to the four admitted traces.
The best single relation is shared_column.
This supports sparse neighbor accounting, not full G900.
positive_results: A sparse neighbor-carrier law was found.
The best sparse law is shared_B plus reverse_partner.
The best sparse law has 480 edges, far below the 7140 complete graph.
The best sparse law reaches all 120 records from the admitted residue.
The best sparse law settles every shell back to the admitted four.
The best single-relation carrier is shared_column.
negative_results: No full 900-state return cycle was found.
No independent witness layer was found.
No full G900 admission was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call this full G900.
Do not call Gap A closed.
Do not call the sparse 120-record carrier a 900-state evaluator.
Do not treat row/support absorption as independent witness.
allowed_next_work: Audit the sparse law shared_B plus reverse_partner for source-native meaning.
Compare shared_B plus reverse_partner against shared_column as alternate carrier law.
Search for an independent witness layer over the sparse carrier.
Return to WXYZTI generator derivation with sparse neighbor-accounting as a constraint.

interpretation.main_result: The saturated neighbor carrier was sharpened to a sparse carrier law.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The complete-graph caveat is reduced: neighbor accounting can be carried by a much smaller source-facing relation family.
interpretation.why_not_closure: The sparse law is still a 120-record source-shell/register carrier, not a full 900-state evaluator or independent witness.
interpretation.next_move: Audit shared_B plus reverse_partner for source-native meaning.

claim.short_form: Sparse neighbor carrier supported; full G900 not reached.
claim.not_closed_reason: The sparse law is still a 120-record source-shell/register carrier, not a full 900-state evaluator or independent witness.
claim.next_problem: Audit shared_B plus reverse_partner for source-native meaning.
